description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized human figure standing upright with both hands held together at the chest. The figure has a prominent, elongated head with defined facial features including large eyes, a pronounced nose, and lips. The hair or headdress is textured and extends down the back, ending in a point. The back of the figure features a rectangular, relief-like element, possibly representing a garment or accessory. The surface is dark, matte, and appears to be carved from a single piece of material, likely wood or stone. The overall form is simple yet expressive, with minimal detailing on the limbs and body.
description: A dark, upright human figure sculpture with stylized facial features, textured hair or headdress, and hands clasped at the chest.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated head, prominent nose, and the textured hair or headdress extending down the back.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the symmetrical face, clasped hands at the chest, and the upright posture.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the facial profile and arm positioning.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the textured hair or headdress and a rectangular relief element on the back.
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is isolated and white.

license_info.creator_display_name: Museo Nacional de Historia Natural de Chile
